dict.string: Used to open Terminal so you can run `claude /login` when adding an account.
Copyright © 2026 Thanh Ngô. Licensed under MIT.
Claude Bar 10.46 — menu-bar manager for multiple Claude Code accounts

Full popover layout restructured to match Standard. Auto-swap slider and the token-usage chart are pinned to the bottom regardless of account count; up to three accounts the popover doesn't scroll at all, four or more accounts only scroll the account list. Frame shrank from 440×760 down to 400×716, and a hairline border was added so the popover edge stays crisp on bright wallpapers. Tiny popover gained a three-column Day / Week / Month token-usage strip in the previously-empty space below the account list. Uses the same `tokenStats` source as Full's chart so the numbers stay in lock-step. Tiny popover threshold slider no longer snaps back when you grab the knob. Both the parent and knob drag gestures now report the cursor position in the same named track coordinate space — the knob's local x ≈ 0 no longer collapses threshold to the left edge. Tiny popover account chips now align cleanly down the right edge regardless of digit count. The "5h" / "7d" label slot and the value slot are pinned to fixed widths so "0%" rows no longer slide left relative to "10%" rows. Settings window gets the pointing-hand cursor on every Button, Toggle, Picker, Stepper, and Link via a single AppKit cursor tracker installed on the Settings NSWindow — no per-Button decoration needed.

Fixed Full popover overflowing into a scroll when more than one account existed. Fixed Tiny popover threshold slider snapping back to the left when grabbing the knob. Fixed Tiny popover account chips zig-zagging because chip width varied with value digit count. Fixed missing pointing-hand cursor on Settings buttons / toggles.
